rationale.R1.1: The artifact centers on a contribution claim (first formal analysis, convergence theorem, uncertainty estimator pivot); 'stronger' plausibly targets sharpening the thesis and framing of what is actually proved versus argued.
rationale.R1.2: The passage chains assumptions (conditional independence, bounded disagreement) through Hoeffding to Theorem 3.2 to the Brier-score corollary; 'stronger' plausibly targets tightening that logical chain and surfacing hidden gaps.
rationale.R1.6: Prose-level strengthening—sentence vigor, precision of hedges, paragraph momentum—is a natural reading of 'make this stronger' for an academic abstract/introduction.
